message.content:
Yeah… um… I guess there’s something I’m supposed to tell you.

It’s kind of weird and I don’t really like talking about it. And I don’t want you to be mad at me or anything. Or like… think I’m lying.

It’s about my uncle. He… sometimes when I’m at my grandma’s house and everyone’s in the other room, he… like… sits really close to me and starts… touching me. Not like a normal hug. I don’t like it. I told him to stop once and he laughed and said I was “too sensitive.”

It’s been happening for a while. Not every time, but enough that I try not to go over there. My mom keeps asking why I don’t want to visit, and I just say I’m tired or I have homework. I haven’t told her because I don’t want to make everyone in my family mad, or like, start a big fight.

I feel kind of gross after, and then I feel stupid for not doing anything. Sometimes I think maybe it’s not that big a deal and I’m overreacting. But then I get this feeling in my stomach when I know I’m going to see him.

I don’t really know what you’re supposed to do with this. I just… thought I should tell someone. But I’m scared what’s going to happen if I do. Are you going to tell my parents? Or like… the police or something? I don’t want everything to get worse.
